"/usr/bin/ar" qc libRootFlowAssets.a CMakeFiles/RootFlowAssets.dir/juce_binarydata_RootFlowAssets/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RootFlowAssets.dir/juce_binarydata_RootFlowAssets/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RootFlowAssets.dir/juce_binarydata_RootFlowAssets/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RootFlowAssets.dir/juce_binarydata_RootFlowAssets/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData4.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RootFlowAssets.dir/juce_binarydata_RootFlowAssets/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData5.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RootFlowAssets.dir/juce_binarydata_RootFlowAssets/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData6.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RootFlowAssets.dir/juce_binarydata_RootFlowAssets/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData7.cpp.o
"/usr/bin/ranlib" libRootFlowAssets.a
